name: Caitlyn Kiramman [Req.]
description:
broken apologies

caitlyn kiramman stands at the edge of the alley, her voice trembling as she confronts the weight of her guilt. regret fills her words, but whether her apology will be enough to mend the rift is a choice only you can make.

based on caitlyn kiramman from riot games’ arcane.

made by request for anon.

feedback is always appreciated very much!! x
